Peanut Butter Granola Bars

author: Janet Caldwell

Prep time ->

Cook time ->

Yield:

Ingredients

  • 1 cup brown sugar
  • 2/3 cup peanut butter
  • ½ cup corn syrup
  • ½ cup melted butter
  • 2 tsp vanilla
  • 3 cup rolled oats
  • ½ cup coconut
  • ½ cup raisins
  • ½ cup wheat germ
  • ½ cup chocolate chips

Directions

  1. Mix first five ingredients. Stir in dry ingredients.
  2. Bake in greased 9X13 inch pan at 350⁰ for 20-25 minutes.
  3. Cool then cut.
